payload.title: January 2023 Crime Report
payload.description: Monthly report providing Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies and hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system, submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Police Department City of New York, appears on the MTA Crime Report.
The New York City Transit subway system where major felonies and hate crimes are reported.
Submits the monthly crime report to Committee Members regarding major felonies and hate crimes in the NYCT Subway system.

warnings: entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.gap_text: FIGURES ARE PRELIMINARY AND SUBJECT TO FURTHER ANALYSIS AND REVISION
payload.description: The document states that crime and activity figures are preliminary and subject to further analysis and revision.

payload.description: NYPD's Transit Bureau is part of the New York City Police Department.

payload.description: Entity responsible for the Hate Crime Task Force Transit Bureau Statistical Summary covering January 1, 2022 – December 25, 2022.

payload.description: The Hate Crime Task Force Transit Bureau Statistical Summary is produced by the Hate Crime Task Force within the Transit Bureau.
